features.featureTitle: In the Hero section, replace the subtitle/tagline text that currently reads 'Professional eSports organization' with 'Professional Esports Tournament's App'. Target the element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[7]/div[1] — this corresponds to a text block inside HeroSection.tsx. Update only this specific text node; do not change any other content.
